name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

<!-- What problem are you trying to solve? Who hits it, and how
often? Concrete examples beat abstract goals. -->

## Proposed direction

<!-- Optional. If you have an idea for a solution, sketch it here.
You do NOT need a complete design — directional thinking is enough.
A formal proposal will live under docs/proposals/ if the idea is
accepted. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Optional. Other approaches you thought about, with the
reason for not picking them. -->

## Related RFCs / ADRs

<!-- Link any existing proposals or decisions that touch this area.
The full list lives in docs/proposals/README.md and docs/adr/README.md. -->
